name: vms
description: Vessel and lighter operations (NestJS API + Next.js app)

scripts.postinstall: npm run prisma:generate -w backend && node scripts/fix-prisma-client-default.cjs
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate -w backend && node scripts/fix-prisma-client-default.cjs && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.ci: npm run format:check && npm test && npm run lint && npm run build
